title: Adidas x Bad Bunny "BadBo 1.0" Sneaker — Global Registration Opens
detail: Registration opens globally for the Adidas x Bad Bunny "BadBo 1.0" sneaker in the Beige and Black colorway, ahead of the official launch set for March 28, 2026 in selected stores worldwide. The collaboration continues Bad Bunny's long-running footwear partnership with Adidas, which has produced some of the most sought-after sneaker drops in recent years.
